examples: I attempted a classic rock and roll quiff.
With his big brown eyes and adorable quiff of light brown hair, Prince George is wasting no time in wowing the crowds Down Under.
Trump's golden quiff, bushy eyebrows and preening gestures were immortalized this week in China — though perhaps not in a way that he would like.
The world's most famous boy reporter with a trademark quiff set foot in India only twice.
Imraan Peerzada's Zar Gul is every inch the dandy outlaw-about-town: a smoldering gaze, bouncing quiff, tweaked mustache and the smile of a shark on the prowl.
